title: Two teens killed in motorbike crash with bus in Western Sydney | ABC NEWS
description: Two teenagers have been killed in a collision between their trail bike and a bus in Western Sydney.  Police allege the 15-year-old driver and his 14-year-old passenger were riding in a lane reserved for buses and emergency vehicles before crashing into the side of a bus on the Liverpool Parramatta Transitway in Bossley Park.  Fairfield Mayor Frank Carbone is calling for tougher laws to prevent similar occurrences. title: Queensland proposes country's strongest legislation for e-bikes and e-scooters | ABC NEWS
description: The Queensland government will accept, or accept in-principle, 28 recommendations made by a parliamentary inquiry into e-mobility devices. title: Ambulances at Jewish organisation set on fire in London | ABC NEWS
description: Four ambulances belonging to a Jewish community ambulance service have been set on fire and destroyed in London in what police say is an antisemitic hate crime.  Explosions were heard in the area around the Machzike Hadath synagogue, which police say was due to gas canisters onboard the Hatzola Northwest ambulances.  The London fire service said the explosions broke windows in a nearby block of flats.  "We know this incident will cause a great deal of community concern and officers remain on scene to carry out urgent enquiries," Superintendent Sarah Jackson said.  "We believe we are looking for three suspects at this early stage," she added, confirming there'd been no arrests.  "We will be engaging with faith leaders and carrying out additional patrols in the local area as we continue our investigation to provide reassurance and a highly visible presence."
